description: Dead links shipped to production repeatedly — doc links in hq-state.json not verified against actual files before deploy
prevention: Added pre-deploy validation script: python3 checks all doc links resolve to real .md files. Run before every git push.

description: UTC timestamps displayed instead of Mountain Time — all user-facing timestamps must be MT
prevention: All hq-state.json timestamps now use -06:00 offset. JS already uses timeZone: America/Denver. Nel audit should flag any Z-suffix timestamps in hq-state.json.

description: Findings reported without resolution status — Nel reports issues but doesn't track if they're fixed/pending/resolved
prevention: Nel view now shows status badges per finding category. Nel report should include resolution state going forward.

description: Task marked complete without verification — changes made to local files but not deployed or tested against live site
prevention: Post-completion checklist: 1) verify local file has changes, 2) git push succeeds, 3) Vercel deploy READY, 4) fetch live page and confirm content. Never mark done until step 4 passes.

description: Copy/paste commands given to Hyo instead of using queue — violates zero-copy-paste rule. Hyo time is the bottleneck.
prevention: CLAUDE.md hydration requires queue ping at session start. AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md ZERO COPY-PASTE RULE. Daily audit checks for [NEEDS HYO] items that should be queue commands. If queue is down, fix queue — never fall back to copy-paste.
